payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. These relationships are mutually inconsistent for the same person without additional clarification, so no durable update should be made.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to the same named person, Sara, but asserts a relationship that conflicts with existing memory.

details: Detected conflict between existing and new kinship relationship.
Preserved ambiguity by not committing the new fact.
Did not present the new relationship as current because it conflicts with stored memory.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.
If it is a different person, create a separate entity for Sara with distinguishing context.
If the earlier memory was incorrect, explicitly correct or replace it before committing a new relationship.
